name: dc-hub-intelligence
description: Real-time data center intelligence: 21,000+ facilities, M&A deals, grid data across 10 North-American grid operators (7 US ISOs plus TVA, BPA and Ontario's IESO) and 43 US utility balancing authorities, plus 3 international grids (Hydro-Québec, AESO, Nord Pool) modeled, fiber routes, water risk, tax incentives. AI capex deal tracker + AI Compute Capacity Index.
tools_summary: Facility search, site planning, grid intelligence, market ranking, AI capex events, M&A history, hyperscaler deal tracker, AI Compute Capacity Index.
